title: When Pigs Fly 「猪萝纪」
description: A wildly absurd adventure that completely defies the laws of gravity! 一场彻底颠覆重力法则的荒诞冒险！
body:
## Remember to Download Resource Pack: 记得下载资源包：[When Pigs Fly RP](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/when-pigs-fly-rp)

### From 1.5 :
**Technoblade** joined the game  
**Enchanted Golden Carrot** joined the game

## **Datapack Introduction: "When Pigs Fly"**  
—— A wildly absurd adventure that completely defies the laws of gravity! Watch as Minecraft’s mounts, villagers, and even creepers break free from Earth’s pull and embark on a hilarious journey of airborne chaos!  

### ✨ **Classic Features**  
1. **Disturbing Dreams: Villagers Take Flight**  
   When you sneak up on **a sleeping villager**, they will instantly launch out of bed! Is it a prank or magic? Either way, they won’t be sleeping tonight…  

2. **Teamwork Makes the Float Work**  
   When you approach **a teammate (or any other player)**, cooperative adventure? No—cooperative floating! Hold hands and enjoy the view from above!  

3. **Mounts Hover Gracefully**  
   While **riding any creature (pigs, horses, llamas, even skeleton horses)**, both the mount and the player enter "light-step mode"—slow, floating movement! Say goodbye to running and hello to elegant aerial strolls!  

4. **Floating Creeper: Explosions Leave Clouds**  
   If **a levitating creeper explodes**, it doesn’t just vanish—it leaves behind a **lingering area effect cloud**! Any creature (including players) touching this cloud will continue to float… triggering a chain reaction of airborne danger!  

5. **And more...**  
- Player approaches a pig → Both float (Pig: "**I’m flying, what about you?**")  
- Creature approaches player → Triggers levitation (Creeper: "**I look cooler exploding mid-air!**")  
- Creature hit by an arrow → Immediately ascends (Hit a Blaze? **It becomes a moving target!**)  

### 🎯 **Advancement Overview**

| Advancement Name | Icon | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **When Pigs Fly** | Pig Spawn Egg | That's what'll happen |
| **Pig Feed** | Carrot | Eat 'em all |
| **Rudder** | Carrot on a Stick | Why did you make that? |
| **UFO** | Creeper Head | Suspended Explosive |
| **Gold Rush** | Flint | All that glitters is not gold |
| **Sss...Sss...Sss...** | Gunpowder | BOOM!!! |
| **I'm Hit!** | Skeleton Skull | Tell my pig I love her... |
| **Bow** | Bow | Nothing special |
| **Arrow of Magic** | Arrow of Levitation | Recyclable |

<details>
<summary>Hidden Advancements</summary>

| Advancement Name | Icon | Description |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **The Wonderful Adventures of Nils** | Saddle | As you could imagine |
| **Chaos Combo** | Golden Carrot | Hit a Creeper when riding a pig |
| **Visiting Relatives** | Crimson Nylium | Ride a pig into the Nether |
| **Unwelcome Guest** | Piglin Head | Hit by Hoglins, Piglins, Piglin Brutes, Zoglins & Zombified Piglins |
| **Interstellar** | Damaged Elytra | Ride a pig into the End |
| **It doesn't hurt at all** | Enchanted Golden Carrot | Hit by Shulkers when riding a Pig |

</details>

### 🌟 **Design Highlights**  
- **Multiple Triggers**: Sleeping, riding, exploding, approaching… every interaction might send you skyward!  
- **Physics Defied**: Villager wakefulness becomes lift, creeper explosions leave "float clouds"—science? Not here!  
- **Multiplayer Mayhem**: Prank teammates, scare villagers, ride pigs into the sky—perfect for server shenanigans and explosive entertainment!  

### 🐷 **Author’s Note**  
> "This datapack proves it:  
> In **Minecraft**, not only can’t **Newton’s coffin** stay closed—it gets **blown sky-high** by creepers!  
> Welcome to the **absurd world** where everything can float!"  

---

**Supported Versions**: Minecraft Java Edition 1.14+  
**Installation**: Place the datapack into your world’s `datapacks` folder and restart the game.  
**Warning**: Watch out for floating creepers—they might **explode on your roof**!  

---

### 自1.5起：
**Technoblade**加入了游戏  
**附魔金胡萝卜**加入了游戏

## 数据包介绍：**「猪萝纪」（When Pigs Fly）**  
—— 一场彻底颠覆重力法则的荒诞冒险！让 Minecraft 的坐骑、村民甚至苦力怕都摆脱地心引力，开启空中乱舞的爆笑旅程！

### ✨ **经典特性**  
1. **惊扰美梦：村民飞天**  
   当你悄悄靠近**正在睡觉的村民**，村民会瞬间从床上弹射起飞！是恶作剧还是魔法？反正今晚他不用睡觉了……  

2. **队友同心，齐力升天**  
   当你接近**队友（或其他玩家）**，合作冒险？不，是合作飘浮！——快手拉手一起俯瞰大地吧！  

3. **坐骑凌波微步**  
   **骑乘任意生物（猪、马、羊驼甚至骷髅马）** 时，坐骑与玩家将进入“凌波微步”模式——缓慢飘浮移动！从此代步不再是奔跑，而是优雅的空中漫步！  

4. **漂浮苦力怕：爆炸留云**  
   如果**漂浮的苦力怕被引爆**，它不会普通消失——而是留下一片 **持续漂浮的区域效果云**！任何接触这片云的生物（包括玩家）都会继续飘浮……连锁反应，空中危机四伏！ 
5. **还有更多……**  
- 玩家靠近猪 → 双方漂浮（猪：“**我飞了，你呢？**”）  
- 生物靠近玩家 → 触发漂浮（苦力怕：“**我飘着炸更帅！**”）  
- 生物被箭射中 → 立即升空（射中烈焰人？**它变身移动标靶！**）  

### 🎯 **进度体系**  

| 进度名称 | 图标 | 描述 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **猪萝纪** | 猪刷怪蛋 | 命中注定 |
| **猪饲料** | 胡萝卜 | 全部吃掉 |
| **方向舵** | 胡萝卜钓竿 | 你为什么要做那个？ |
| **不明飞行物** | 苦力怕头颅 | 悬浮爆炸物 |
| **淘金热** | 燧石 | 闪光的未必都是金子 |
| **嘶...嘶...嘶...** | 火药 | 砰！！！ |
| **我中箭了！** | 骷髅头 | 告诉我的猪我爱她…… |
| **弓** | 弓 | 平常之物 |
| **魔法之箭** | 漂浮箭矢 | 可回收物 |

<details>
<summary>隐藏进度</summary>

| 进度名称 | 图标 | 描述 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **尼尔斯骑猪旅行记** | 鞍 | 如你所愿 |
| **大杂烩** | 金胡萝卜 | 骑猪时击中苦力怕 |
| **走亲访友** | 绯红菌岩 | 骑猪进入下界 |
| **不速之客** | 猪灵头颅 | 被疣猪兽、猪灵、猪灵蛮兵、僵尸疣猪兽和僵尸猪灵攻击 |
| **星际穿越** | 损坏的鞘翅 | 骑猪进入末地 |
| **一点也不疼** | 附魔金胡萝卜 | 骑猪时被潜影贝攻击 |

</details>


### 🌟 **设计亮点**  
- **多重触发机制**：睡眠、骑乘、爆炸、靠近……每种交互都可能让你离开地面！  
- **物理法则崩坏**：村民起床气化作升力，苦力怕爆炸留下“浮力云”，科学？不存在的！  
- **多人欢乐联动**：坑队友、吓村民、骑猪飞天——服务器整蛊必备，节目效果爆棚！  

### 🐷 **作者吐槽**  
> “这个数据包证明了：  
> 在**Minecraft**，**牛顿的棺材板**不仅盖不上，还会被苦力怕**炸上天**！  
> 欢迎来到——万物皆可浮空的**离谱世界**！”

---

**适用版本**：Minecraft Java版 1.14+  
**安装方式**：将数据包放入存档的 `datapacks` 文件夹，重启游戏即可生效。  
**注意**：小心漂浮的苦力怕——它们可能会**在你的屋顶上爆炸**！
